overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic city during an atmospheric sandstorm that gradually clears to reveal a waterfront cityscape. The video transitions from a narrow alley through urban streets with prominent digital billboards to an open waterfront promenade with towering neon-lit skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor transitioning to city street

events.description: exits narrow corridor with illuminated arrow signs into open urban street with heavy orange atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow passage and emerging onto a city sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: wall-mounted directional lights with yellow chevron arrows pointing forward
tall plain concrete wall of the narrow passage
large curved digital billboard displaying political campaign advertisement with red white and blue colors
tall palm tree silhouetted against the orange hazy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow concrete corridor with illuminated directional arrow signs on the wall. The camera walks forward and emerges around 2.5 seconds into an open urban street bathed in heavy orange atmospheric haze. A large digital billboard for 'Vote Peralez' becomes visible on the right, and a palm tree stands silhouetted in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with commercial buildings and political advertising

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing the large digital billboard on the right

notable_agents.action: dark-colored car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: modern curved street light pole with dual lamps
tall multi-story building with geometric facade patterns visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: Walking along a city street with the 'Vote Peralez' billboard now prominent on the right side. The orange haze continues to dominate the atmosphere. Palm trees line the street, and occasional vehicles pass by on the road. Pedestrians walk ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection approaching waterfront with clearing weather

events.description: heavy orange sandstorm haze dissipates rapidly revealing clear blue sky and distant buildings
waiting at traffic light then crossing the street as vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, waiting for traffic, then crossing the street while observing the clearing weather

notable_agents.action: black van driving past the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights and pedestrian signals
raised highway overpass structure with support columns
metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront promenade

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an intersection where the orange haze suddenly clears around 35 seconds, revealing a bright blue sky and futuristic cityscape. The ego waits at a traffic light and crosses the street as vehicles pass by. The waterfront becomes visible on the right with a metal railing, and an elevated highway structure appears in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with panoramic city views

events.description: reaches waterfront promenade with clear view of water and futuristic skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade and panning to admire the cityscape and industrial structures

entered.detail: tall building with large pink and blue digital billboard on the roof
cluster of futuristic industrial buildings with pipes and scaffolding along the water
calm body of water reflecting the buildings along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a stunning waterfront promenade with clear blue skies. The camera walks along the paved waterfront path, passing metal railings, with futuristic skyscrapers and industrial structures visible across the water. The scene is devoid of pedestrians, focusing on the architectural panorama of the futuristic cityscape with neon signs and towering glass buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic concrete corridor through a hazy urban center and finally into a bright, open waterfront panorama. It begins by moving through a narrow hallway marked by illuminated directional arrows before emerging into a city street engulfed in a heavy orange atmospheric haze. As the camera advances past palm trees and a prominent Vote Peralez digital billboard, the dense orange fog suddenly clears at a busy intersection to reveal a brilliant blue sky and a sprawling futuristic cityscape. The scene then shifts toward the water as the camera crosses the street and follows a paved promenade lined with metal railings. Finally, the view opens fully onto a stunning architectural vista of towering glass skyscrapers and neon signs reflecting across the water under a clear sky.
